title: GitHub - geminimir/warden: Fail-closed authorization gateway for agentic RAG — capability-label pushdown, deny-aware barriers, per-turn agent-context revalidation.
excerpt: Fail-closed authorization gateway for agentic RAG — capability-label pushdown, deny-aware barriers, per-turn agent-context revalidation. - geminimir/warden
content_html:
Permission-aware retrieval and agent-authorization gateway for AI systems.

Warden enforces relationship-based, deny-aware, cross-tenant document permissions inside the retrieval path of agentic RAG systems — behind a fail-closed security boundary, with agent-context revalidation and a tamper-evident audit trail.

Every existing tool answers "can user U read document D?" None of them answer "what should this agent be allowed to retrieve, keep in context, and cite — right now?"

The problem, in one paragraph

The two obvious designs both fail.

  • Post-filter (retrieve top-K, then check permissions) is safe but recall collapses under selectivity. If a principal is authorized on 1% of the corpus, top-50 by pure similarity contains ~0.5 authorized docs in expectation.
  • Pre-filter by expanded ID list (SpiceDB.LookupResources, OpenFGA.ListObjects) preserves recall but is O(|Authorized(u)|). A firm-wide partner is authorized on 10⁷+ documents. You cannot ship a ten-million-element IN clause into an ANN query.

Warden flattens the authorization graph into small capability-label sets that push down into the vector index as an int[] overlap predicate — O(1) in corpus size — and then treats that filter as a performance optimization only. The security boundary is a separate fail-closed check against the graph itself, on the small candidate set, right before anything enters the model's context.

Architecture — the three gates

    agent tool call: retrieve(query)         ← principal is bound server-side to the session
              │                                (NEVER a model-supplied argument)
              ▼
   ┌─ GATE 1 · PRE-FILTER ────────────────────────────────────┐  performance
   │  L(u), B(u) from Redis  [may be stale — permissive only] │
   │  ANN search inside org partition, predicate pushed down: │
   │      acl_labels && L(u)  AND NOT (barrier_tags && B(u))  │
   │  over-fetch K' = 1.5·K                                   │
   └───────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                               ▼ K' candidates
   ┌─ GATE 2 · AUTHORITATIVE CHECK ───────────────────────────┐  ← THE SECURITY BOUNDARY
   │  check(u, read, d) against the tuple graph. FAIL-CLOSED. │
   │  deny > allow. expiry enforced. audit row + reason_path. │
   └───────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                               ▼ authorized top-K → LLM context
   ┌─ GATE 3 · SESSION REVALIDATION ──────────────────────────┐  temporal
   │  before EVERY model call: re-check all context doc refs  │
   │  evict revoked → inject "[N sources removed]" → replan   │
   │  before final answer: re-check every citation            │
   └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Two invariants everything rests on

  1. Gate 1 is an optimization; Gate 2 is the boundary. A stale cache, a bad label, a pgvector quirk — none can leak, because Gate 2 re-checks the graph. Gate 1 exists so Gate 2 is cheap. Gate 2 exists so Gate 1 is allowed to be wrong.
  2. LabelFilter(u) ⊇ Authorized(u) — the pre-filter must be a permissive superset. Therefore stale revocations are safe (Gate 2 catches them) and stale grants silently destroy recall (nothing catches them). Grants propagate eagerly; revocations may propagate lazily. This inverts the naive intuition.

Why prompt injection fails against this: the model can influence the query string. It cannot influence who is asking. The principal is bound to the session server-side and is never a tool parameter. Authorization is enforced at the tool boundary, not by the model's good behavior — because model alignment is not a security control.

Tech stack

Layer Choice Why
Language Python 3.11+ FastAPI ecosystem, Hypothesis, LLM SDKs
API FastAPI Typed, async, OpenAPI-native
Storage Postgres 16 + pgvector 0.8+ ReBAC tuples, vectors, audit — one transaction boundary, no distributed consistency to hand-wave
Cache Redis labels:{principal}:{epoch} with write-through invalidation
Vector index pgvector HNSW + GIN on int[] Filtered ANN with iterative index scan
Testing Hypothesis + pytest Property-based differential tests vs. a reference oracle
Packaging Docker Compose One-command setup
CI GitHub Actions Property tests + 10-scenario suite + make bench on every PR

Pluggable AuthzBackend protocol ships with two implementations: our native Postgres engine, and an OpenFGA adapter for teams that already run one.

Repo layout

warden/
├── core/
│   ├── algebra.py         # formal permission semantics
│   ├── oracle.py          # brute-force ground truth — DO NOT OPTIMIZE
│   ├── rebac.py           # check() / expand() / ReasonPath
│   ├── barriers.py        # deny layer + tag encoding
│   └── labels.py          # materialization, epochs, Redis cache
├── retrieval/
│   ├── index.py           # pgvector, partitioning
│   └── strategies.py      # exact | iterative | partitioned
├── gateway/
│   ├── gates.py           # 1, 2, 3
│   ├── session.py         # typed context refs
│   ├── audit.py           # hash chain + verify
│   └── api.py             # FastAPI
├── backends/
│   ├── protocol.py        # AuthzBackend
│   ├── postgres.py
│   └── openfga.py
├── agent/                 # minimal real agent loop
├── evals/
│   ├── generators.py      # Hypothesis strategies
│   ├── differential.py    # vs. oracle
│   ├── scenarios/         # the 10 adversarial cases
│   ├── baseline.py        # naive RAG
│   └── bench/             # the 4 tables
├── profiles/legal.yaml
├── demo/
└── docker-compose.yml

Milestones

Ship in order. Each milestone has open issues linked to it.

# Milestone What ships
W0 Reference oracle + property harness Formal algebra, brute-force oracle, adversarial graph generators
W1 ReBAC core Postgres schema, check() with reason paths, information barriers
W2 Labels + retrieval index Materialization + Redis, pgvector + GIN + partitioning, three ANN strategies
W3 Gateway + agent lifecycle FastAPI, session refs, Gate 3, hash-chained audit, real agent loop
W4 Eval harness + benchmarks 10-scenario suite + naive baseline, four benchmark tables
W5 Ship it OpenFGA adapter, docker-compose + CI, 30-second demo UI

Non-goals

Stated explicitly because naming what we didn't build is a seniority signal.

  • Not an authorization engine competing with SpiceDB or OpenFGA. Warden is the gateway that composes an authz model with a retrieval path and an agent lifecycle. Native engine so it works standalone; adapter so it doesn't have to.
  • Not a vector database. pgvector is an implementation detail.
  • Not production-hardened. Single-node, synthetic benchmarks. Numbers will say so plainly.
  • Not a hallucination checker. Citation stripping here is an access-control mechanism, not a correctness one.

Quick start

docker-compose up          # Postgres + pgvector + Redis + API + seeded demo corpus
make test                  # property tests + 10 scenarios
make bench                 # four benchmark tables (smoke scale)
make demo                  # split-screen UI at http://localhost:3000

License

TBD.

blocks.html_en: Permission-aware retrieval and agent-authorization gateway for AI systems.

sentences.en: Permission-aware retrieval and agent-authorization gateway for AI systems.
sentences.zh: 人工智能系统的权限感知检索和代理授权网关。

blocks.html_en: Warden enforces relationship-based, deny-aware, cross-tenant document permissions inside the retrieval path of agentic RAG systems — behind a fail-closed security boundary, with agent-context revalidation and a tamper-evident audit trail.

sentences.en: Warden enforces relationship-based, deny-aware, cross-tenant document permissions inside the retrieval path of agentic RAG systems — behind a fail-closed security boundary, with agent-context revalidation and a tamper-evident audit trail.
sentences.zh: Warden 在代理 RAG 系统的检索路径内强制执行基于关系、拒绝感知、跨租户的文档权限 - 在故障关闭的安全边界后面，具有代理上下文重新验证和防篡改审计跟踪。

blocks.html_en: Warden enforces relationship-based, deny-aware, cross-tenant document permissions inside the retrieval path of agentic RAG systems — behind a fail-closed security boundary, with agent-context revalidation and a tamper-evident audit trail.

sentences.en: Warden enforces relationship-based, deny-aware, cross-tenant document permissions inside the retrieval path of agentic RAG systems — behind a fail-closed security boundary, with agent-context revalidation and a tamper-evident audit trail.
sentences.zh: Warden 在代理 RAG 系统的检索路径内强制执行基于关系、拒绝感知、跨租户的文档权限 - 在故障关闭的安全边界后面，具有代理上下文重新验证和防篡改审计跟踪。

blocks.html_en: Every existing tool answers "can user U read document D?" None of them answer "what should this agent be allowed to retrieve, keep in context, and cite — right now?"

sentences.en: Every existing tool answers "can user U read document D?"
sentences.zh: 每个现有工具都会回答“用户 U 可以读取文档 D 吗？”

sentences.en: None of them answer "what should this agent be allowed to retrieve, keep in context, and cite — right now?"
sentences.zh: 他们都没有回答“现在应该允许该代理检索、保留上下文并引用什么？”

blocks.html_en: The problem, in one paragraph

sentences.zh: 问题在一个段落中

blocks.html_en: The two obvious designs both fail.

sentences.en: The two obvious designs both fail.
sentences.zh: 这两个明显的设计都失败了。

blocks.html_en: • Post-filter (retrieve top-K, then check permissions) is safe but recall collapses under selectivity. If a principal is authorized on 1% of the corpus, top-50 by pure similarity contains ~0.5 authorized docs in expectation.

sentences.en: Post-filter (retrieve top-K, then check permissions) is safe but recall collapses under selectivity.
sentences.zh: 后置过滤器（检索 top-K，然后检查权限）是安全的，但在选择性下召回会崩溃。

sentences.en: If a principal is authorized on 1% of the corpus, top-50 by pure similarity contains ~0.5 authorized docs in expectation.
sentences.zh: 如果主体在语料库的 1% 上获得授权，则纯粹相似性的前 50 名预计包含约 0.5 个授权文档。

blocks.html_en: • Pre-filter by expanded ID list (SpiceDB.LookupResources, OpenFGA.ListObjects) preserves recall but is O(|Authorized(u)|). A firm-wide partner is authorized on 10⁷+ documents. You cannot ship a ten-million-element IN clause into an ANN query.

sentences.en: Pre-filter by expanded ID list (SpiceDB.LookupResources, OpenFGA.ListObjects) preserves recall but is O(|Authorized(u)|).
sentences.zh: 按扩展 ID 列表（SpiceDB.LookupResources、OpenFGA.ListObjects）进行预过滤可以保留召回率，但时间复杂度为 O(|Authorized(u)|)。

sentences.en: A firm-wide partner is authorized on 10⁷+ documents.
sentences.zh: 全公司范围内的合作伙伴获得了超过 10⁷ 文件的授权。

sentences.en: You cannot ship a ten-million-element IN clause into an ANN query.
sentences.zh: 您无法将一千万个元素的 IN 子句传送到 ANN 查询中。

blocks.html_en: Warden flattens the authorization graph into small capability-label sets that push down into the vector index as an int[] overlap predicate — O(1) in corpus size — and then treats that filter as a performance optimization only. The security boundary is a separate fail-closed check against the graph itself, on the small candidate set, right before anything enters the model's context.

sentences.en: Warden flattens the authorization graph into small capability-label sets that push down into the vector index as an int[] overlap predicate — O(1) in corpus size — and then treats that filter as a performance optimization only.
sentences.zh: Warden 将授权图扁平化为小的功能标签集，这些标签集作为 int[] 重叠谓词下推到向量索引中（语料库大小为 O(1)），然后将该过滤器仅视为性能优化。

sentences.en: The security boundary is a separate fail-closed check against the graph itself, on the small candidate set, right before anything enters the model's context.
sentences.zh: 安全边界是在任何内容进入模型上下文之前对图本身、小候选集进行的单独的故障关闭检查。
建筑——三扇门

blocks.html_en: Two invariants everything rests on

sentences.zh: 一切都取决于两个不变量

blocks.html_en: • Gate 1 is an optimization; Gate 2 is the boundary. A stale cache, a bad label, a pgvector quirk — none can leak, because Gate 2 re-checks the graph. Gate 1 exists so Gate 2 is cheap. Gate 2 exists so Gate 1 is allowed to be wrong.

sentences.en: Gate 1 is an optimization; Gate 2 is the boundary.
sentences.zh: Gate 1是一个优化； 2号门是边界。

sentences.en: A stale cache, a bad label, a pgvector quirk — none can leak, because Gate 2 re-checks the graph.
sentences.zh: 陈旧的缓存、错误的标签、pgvector 怪癖——没有一个会泄漏，因为 Gate 2 会重新检查图表。

sentences.en: Gate 1 exists so Gate 2 is cheap.
sentences.zh: 存在 1 号门，因此 2 号门很便宜。

sentences.en: Gate 2 exists so Gate 1 is allowed to be wrong.
sentences.zh: Gate 2 存在，所以 Gate 1 是允许错误的。

blocks.html_en: • LabelFilter(u) ⊇ Authorized(u) — the pre-filter must be a permissive superset. Therefore stale revocations are safe (Gate 2 catches them) and stale grants silently destroy recall (nothing catches them). Grants propagate eagerly; revocations may propagate lazily. This inverts the naive intuition.

sentences.en: LabelFilter(u) ⊇ Authorized(u) — the pre-filter must be a permissive superset.
sentences.zh: LabelFilter(u) ns Authorized(u) — 预过滤器必须是许可超集。

sentences.en: Therefore stale revocations are safe (Gate 2 catches them) and stale grants silently destroy recall (nothing catches them).
sentences.zh: 因此，陈旧的撤销是安全的（Gate 2 捕获它们），陈旧的授权会默默地破坏召回（没有任何东西捕获它们）。

sentences.en: Grants propagate eagerly; revocations may propagate lazily.
sentences.zh: 赠款热切传播；撤销可能会延迟传播。
这颠覆了天真的直觉。

blocks.html_en: Why prompt injection fails against this: the model can influence the query string. It cannot influence who is asking. The principal is bound to the session server-side and is never a tool parameter. Authorization is enforced at the tool boundary, not by the model's good behavior — because model alignment is not a security control.

sentences.en: Why prompt injection fails against this: the model can influence the query string.
sentences.zh: 为什么提示注入会失败：模型可以影响查询字符串。

sentences.en: It cannot influence who is asking.
sentences.zh: 它不能影响谁在提问。

sentences.en: The principal is bound to the session server-side and is never a tool parameter.
sentences.zh: 主体绑定到会话服务器端，并且永远不是工具参数。

sentences.en: Authorization is enforced at the tool boundary, not by the model's good behavior — because model alignment is not a security control.
sentences.zh: 授权是在工具边界强制执行的，而不是通过模型的良好行为来强制执行 - 因为模型对齐不是安全控制。
技术栈
选择
语言
FastAPI 生态系统、假设、LLM SDK
快速API
类型化、异步、OpenAPI 原生
贮存

sentences.en: Warden is the gateway that composes an authz model with a retrieval path and an agent lifecycle.

blocks.html_en: • Not production-hardened. Single-node, synthetic benchmarks. Numbers will say so plainly.

blocks.html_en: • Not a hallucination checker. Citation stripping here is an access-control mechanism, not a correctness one.

sentences.zh: 不是幻觉检查器。

sentences.en: Citation stripping here is an access-control mechanism, not a correctness one.
sentences.zh: 这里的引文剥离是一种访问控制机制，而不是正确性机制。
快速启动

content_html_zh:
人工智能系统的权限感知检索和代理授权网关。

Warden 在代理 RAG 系统的检索路径内强制执行基于关系、拒绝感知、跨租户的文档权限 - 在故障关闭的安全边界后面，具有代理上下文重新验证和防篡改审计跟踪。

每个现有工具都会回答“用户 U 可以读取文档 D 吗？” 他们都没有回答“现在应该允许该代理检索、保留上下文并引用什么？”

问题在一个段落中

这两个明显的设计都失败了。

  • 后置过滤器（检索 top-K，然后检查权限）是安全的，但在选择性下召回会崩溃。 如果主体在语料库的 1% 上获得授权，则纯粹相似性的前 50 名预计包含约 0.5 个授权文档。
  • 按扩展 ID 列表（SpiceDB.LookupResources、OpenFGA.ListObjects）进行预过滤可以保留召回率，但时间复杂度为 O(|Authorized(u)|)。 全公司范围内的合作伙伴获得了超过 10⁷ 文件的授权。 您无法将一千万个元素的 IN 子句传送到 ANN 查询中。

Warden 将授权图扁平化为小的功能标签集，这些标签集作为 int[] 重叠谓词下推到向量索引中（语料库大小为 O(1)），然后将该过滤器仅视为性能优化。 安全边界是在任何内容进入模型上下文之前对图本身、小候选集进行的单独的故障关闭检查。

建筑——三扇门

    agent tool call: retrieve(query)         ← principal is bound server-side to the session
              │                                (NEVER a model-supplied argument)
              ▼
   ┌─ GATE 1 · PRE-FILTER ────────────────────────────────────┐  performance
   │  L(u), B(u) from Redis  [may be stale — permissive only] │
   │  ANN search inside org partition, predicate pushed down: │
   │      acl_labels && L(u)  AND NOT (barrier_tags && B(u))  │
   │  over-fetch K' = 1.5·K                                   │
   └───────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                               ▼ K' candidates
   ┌─ GATE 2 · AUTHORITATIVE CHECK ───────────────────────────┐  ← THE SECURITY BOUNDARY
   │  check(u, read, d) against the tuple graph. FAIL-CLOSED. │
   │  deny > allow. expiry enforced. audit row + reason_path. │
   └───────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                               ▼ authorized top-K → LLM context
   ┌─ GATE 3 · SESSION REVALIDATION ──────────────────────────┐  temporal
   │  before EVERY model call: re-check all context doc refs  │
   │  evict revoked → inject "[N sources removed]" → replan   │
   │  before final answer: re-check every citation            │
   └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

一切都取决于两个不变量

  1. Gate 1是一个优化； 2号门是边界。 陈旧的缓存、错误的标签、pgvector 怪癖——没有一个会泄漏，因为 Gate 2 会重新检查图表。 存在 1 号门，因此 2 号门很便宜。 Gate 2 存在，所以 Gate 1 是允许错误的。
  2. LabelFilter(u) ns Authorized(u) — 预过滤器必须是许可超集。 因此，陈旧的撤销是安全的（Gate 2 捕获它们），陈旧的授权会默默地破坏召回（没有任何东西捕获它们）。 赠款热切传播；撤销可能会延迟传播。 这颠覆了天真的直觉。

为什么提示注入会失败：模型可以影响查询字符串。 它不能影响谁在提问。 主体绑定到会话服务器端，并且永远不是工具参数。 授权是在工具边界强制执行的，而不是通过模型的良好行为来强制执行 - 因为模型对齐不是安全控制。

技术栈

Layer 选择 Why
语言 Python 3.11+ FastAPI 生态系统、假设、LLM SDK
API 快速API 类型化、异步、OpenAPI 原生
贮存 Postgres 16 + pgvector 0.8+ ReBAC 元组、向量、审计——一个事务边界，手波没有分布式一致性
Cache Redis labels:{principal}:{epoch} 具有直写失效
向量索引 pgvector HNSW + int[] 上的 GIN 带迭代索引扫描的过滤 ANN
测试 假设+pytest 基于属性的差异测试与参考预言机
包装 Docker 组合 一条命令设置
CI GitHub 操作 性能测试 + 10 个场景套件 + 每个 PR 的制作台

可插入 AuthzBackend 协议附带两种实现：我们的本机 Postgres 引擎，以及适用于已运行该引擎的团队的 OpenFGA 适配器。

仓库布局

warden/
├── core/
│   ├── algebra.py         # formal permission semantics
│   ├── oracle.py          # brute-force ground truth — DO NOT OPTIMIZE
│   ├── rebac.py           # check() / expand() / ReasonPath
│   ├── barriers.py        # deny layer + tag encoding
│   └── labels.py          # materialization, epochs, Redis cache
├── retrieval/
│   ├── index.py           # pgvector, partitioning
│   └── strategies.py      # exact | iterative | partitioned
├── gateway/
│   ├── gates.py           # 1, 2, 3
│   ├── session.py         # typed context refs
│   ├── audit.py           # hash chain + verify
│   └── api.py             # FastAPI
├── backends/
│   ├── protocol.py        # AuthzBackend
│   ├── postgres.py
│   └── openfga.py
├── agent/                 # minimal real agent loop
├── evals/
│   ├── generators.py      # Hypothesis strategies
│   ├── differential.py    # vs. oracle
│   ├── scenarios/         # the 10 adversarial cases
│   ├── baseline.py        # naive RAG
│   └── bench/             # the 4 tables
├── profiles/legal.yaml
├── demo/
└── docker-compose.yml

里程碑

按顺序发货。 每个里程碑都有与之相关的未解决问题。

# 里程碑 什么船
W0 参考oracle+财产线束 形式代数、强力预言机、对抗性图生成器
W1 ReBAC核心 Postgres 架构、带有原因路径的 check()、信息障碍
W2 标签+检索索引 Materialization + Redis、pgvector + GIN + 分区，三种ANN策略
W3 网关+代理生命周期 FastAPI、会话引用、Gate 3、哈希链审计、真实代理循环
W4 评估工具+基准 10 个场景套件 + 朴素基线，四个基准表
W5 运送它 OpenFGA 适配器、docker-compose + CI、30 秒演示 UI

非目标

明确说明是因为命名我们没有构建的东西是一种资历信号。

  • 不是与 SpiceDB 或 OpenFGA 竞争的授权引擎。 Warden 是组成具有检索路径和代理生命周期的 authz 模型的网关。 原生引擎，因此可以独立工作；适配器，所以不需要。
  • 不是矢量数据库。 pgvector 是一个实现细节。
  • 未经过生产强化。 单节点综合基准。 数字会清楚地说明这一点。
  • 不是幻觉检查器。 这里的引文剥离是一种访问控制机制，而不是正确性机制。

快速启动

docker-compose up          # Postgres + pgvector + Redis + API + seeded demo corpus
make test                  # property tests + 10 scenarios
make bench                 # four benchmark tables (smoke scale)
make demo                  # split-screen UI at http://localhost:3000

执照
